content.claim: Gimnazium directors constitute an organized interest group with demonstrated direct access to top political leadership (17 principals collectively lobbied Prime Minister-designate and received personal meetings), positioning them as a concrete veto player relevant to both enactment and reversal of reform.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Political feasibility lens
limitations: Observation is time-specific to 2026 government formation; sustained lobbying capacity over legislative process is not demonstrated
Direct access to leadership does not measure actual influence over formal legislative outcomes
The letter requests 'consultation,' not explicit opposition to abolition; actual red-line positions are not stated
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
